nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Patchy smoke before 5am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 79. Southeast wind around 2 mph.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 8am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 91. Heat index values as high as 105. South wind 1 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Sunday Night
nws.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms Likely then Partly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 11pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 79. South wind 2 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
